prompt: Ultra-realistic black-and-white studio portrait contact sheet of the same rugged, masculine male model with identical facial identity. Wearing a fitted black crew-neck t-shirt, layered silver pendant necklaces, stacked beaded bracelets, multiple silver rings, and small hoop earrings. High-end fashion editorial photography, monochrome, dramatic soft lighting, medium-gray seamless studio background, razor-sharp focus, extremely detailed skin texture, premium magazine photoshoot, cinematic contrast, Leica SL2, 85mm lens, f/2, shallow depth of field, HDR, ultra photorealistic, luxury men's grooming campaign, 8K resolution.
